answer_protocol: Answer the question, then end your reply with one line exactly: ANSWER: <value>

arms.preamble: Read the docs to find the answer.
Use the Read and Grep tools only to find what you need. Do not use knowledge.py.

Do not grep. Use `python3 scripts/knowledge.py list` to see the catalog of docs (title + description), pick the relevant one, then `python3 scripts/knowledge.py section <doc> <heading>` to read just that section.

Use grep to locate candidate docs, scoping it to curated docs via `python3 scripts/knowledge.py list --paths`; then read the matched section cleanly with `python3 scripts/knowledge.py section <doc> <heading>`.
Use `python3 scripts/knowledge.py list` and pick the doc from its title and description alone, then `python3 scripts/knowledge.py section <doc> <heading>`. Do not grep and do not read whole files.

tasks.question: What connection idle timeout, in seconds, does the PRODUCTION gateway profile set?
